name: reporider
description: Mobile-first voice-to-repo assistant for GitHub builders on the move.

scripts.test:safety: tsc --project tsconfig.safety-tests.json && node .safety-test-build/test/safetyScan.fixtures.js && node .safety-test-build/test/safetyAbsolutePath.fixtures.js && node .safety-test-build/test/safetyPackageManifest.fixtures.js && node .safety-test-build/test/receiptPolicy.fixtures.js && node .safety-test-build/test/rideReceiptVerify.fixtures.js && rm -rf .safety-test-build
